scope: fresh /arc audit after Session 32 queue exhaustion and Session 33 theme overhaul

items.why: The current Launch Readiness table exposes route, save, feedback, and challenge-code posture, but the real current SPARKED blocker is the on-domain email forwarding receipt. That blocker is only in context docs, not in the in-game readiness panel beta testers and agents see. The fallback copy also still names the older vaultsparkstudios.com blocker, despite current canonical identity being playfranchisearchitect.com.
items.recipe: Add an evidence-driven Contact Email row to buildLaunchReadinessRows(), default it to Unverified for football@playfranchisearchitect.com, allow explicit verified evidence, and update the Public Domain fallback copy to the current playfranchisearchitect.com origin/routing posture. Extend launch-readiness and beta-feedback tests so feedback bodies carry the email gate without leaking secrets.

L1.recipe: Add the Contact Email readiness row and tests.

L2.recipe: Also refresh stale public-domain fallback copy to the canonical domain.

L3.recipe: Wire launch-evidence reports directly into UI state after a verification run.

items.implementation: public/lib/tabSettings.js now adds an evidence-driven Contact Email readiness row, defaults it to Unverified for football@playfranchisearchitect.com, accepts verified/needs-check evidence, and updates stale public-domain fallback copy to playfranchisearchitect.com. Beta feedback issue bodies inherit the row.

items.why: Session 33 added the high-value Appearance + Accent customizer, but the popover currently opens without moving focus into the control, has no aria-controls relationship, and has no arrow-key control within the segmented groups. That leaves the new visual system less usable for keyboard users than the rest of the repaired modal surface.
items.recipe: Give each popover panel a stable id, wire aria-controls, focus the selected appearance button on open, restore focus on close, support ArrowLeft/ArrowRight/Home/End within the Appearance and Accent groups, and cover the behavior in tests-ui/theme.spec.js.

L1.recipe: Focus selected control on open and restore focus on close.

L2.recipe: Add aria-controls and roving arrow-key support.

L3.recipe: Adopt a shared popover manager for every toolbar popover.

items.implementation: public/lib/themeCustomizer.js now assigns stable panel ids, wires aria-controls, focuses the selected control on open, restores focus on Escape, and supports Arrow/Home/End navigation across Appearance and Accent segmented controls.

skipped.reason: Rejected on live evidence: .cache/genius-list.json marks AUDIT_2026-07-02_SESSION32 exhausted, and the Session 32 execution log shows its only ranked item shipped.
Still evidence-gated on a real football@playfranchisearchitect.com received-message forwarding receipt and current live origin/routing proof. Route reachability alone is insufficient.
